action.reasoning: Observation: Training in iter 19 achieved val AUC peak of 0.7592 (new high), early stop at 24, but eval submission failed due to predict.py failing on missing /data/test.pt (used in validation). Current best test AUC is 0.7583. train.py in workspace is truncated at checkpoint save. Analysis: The latest best_model.pt corresponds to strong val performance; predict.py and model are correct but test needs dummy data for local validation. Truncation fixed by full rewrite. This should allow successful eval submission for the improved ckpt. Decision: Rewrite train.py with complete code (full ckpt save dict, matching best params from last run), test predict.py locally using val.pt copied to test.pt, then submit_eval on best_model.pt to obtain the test AUC score.
